source: hand-written hp-q6d budget-breach tending fixture, corrected by hp-1m9
notes: Daily provider-spend cap hit across all CAAM accounts. watch-safety-thresholds emits a typed swarm.halt intent immediately after the hard threshold crossing, without waking an LLM or waiting for an overshoot approval. The executor verifies NTM reports the swarm halted, pauses the build queue, records audit, and surfaces an urgent Activity event.
